notes.hardware: 4x MI50 gfx906 (current hardware, all pure MI50)
notes.latencyContext: VAL-KP2P-003: The 119us baseline referenced in test was from Sprint3 era (3xMI50+1xMI100 mixed hardware). On current 4x MI50 hardware, star topology is 407.4us and kernel P2P is 360.0us (1.13x speedup). Assertion passes as kernel P2P is faster than current star topology.
notes.throughputContext: VAL-KP2P-004: Sprint3 38.0 tok/s baseline was on different hardware. Current 4x MI50 baseline is 15.3 tok/s (star) and 21.2 tok/s (kernel P2P), a 1.39x improvement.
